title: Little Giant
writer: Walter DeLeon, Paul Jarrico, Richard Collins
actors: Bud Abbott, Lou Costello, Brenda Joyce
plot: Lou Costello plays a country bumpkin vacuum-cleaner salesman, working for the company run by the crooked Bud Abbott. To try to keep him under his thumb, Abbott convinces Costello that he's a crackerjack salesman. This comedy is so...
